checks.name: charged_lepton_holdout_inputs_complete
checks.details: Electron and muon inputs plus measured tau comparison entry are present with explicit source metadata.

checks.name: tau_holdout_applied
checks.details: Tau mass was treated as a holdout comparison target rather than an input to the exact Koide prediction.

checks.name: koide_prediction_branch_selected
checks.details: Selected the large-mass Koide solution branch consistent with charged-lepton mass ordering.

checks.name: prediction_uncertainty_propagated
checks.details: Propagated electron and muon one-sigma uncertainties into the holdout tau prediction and compared against measured tau uncertainty.
